title: achillea millefolium f. californica
intro: Achillea millefolium f. californica, also known as Western Yarrow or California Yarrow, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family and native to the western regions of North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and relieve digestive issues. The health benefits of Achillea millefolium f. californica include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, salves, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
